blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,038 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 29°F, winds around 22 mph. Expect powder.
